item.title: 30 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 235
item.description:
Evening light at Desert View, Grand Canyon National Park, Arizona.
Gold Coast, Queensland Australia
Gold Coast, Australia
Foothills of the Rocky Mountains near Estes Park, Larimer County, Colorado.
u/Dachshundloversclub
Currumbin Creek, Queensland Australia
https://www.reddit.com/r/aww/comments/1sc88l1/went_on_a_hike_and_met_this_lil_girl/
I accidentally doubled up on an image, so I removed it and added a link to this one: https://i.imgur.com/oOTC6AC.jpeg
Letter from Akira Kurosawa to Ingmar Bergman on his seventieth birthday:
Burleigh Headland national park, Queensland Australia
Mt Cougal, Queensland/New South Wales border, Australia
https://www.reddit.com/r/wholesome/comments/1scljpa/my_inheritance/
Growth update from Goose, just about 3 months old now ~u/wingcomple
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Deviousness Day 165
item.description:
had good birfday yesterday. just chill. did some gaming. so was good. still obsessing with plateup. anyway. memes. enjoy!
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on some Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 was my birthday yesterday yay. know previously people have giftied me some stuffs via throne, steam, ko-fi (fees tho ugh), and cashapp from people appreciating what I do with memes here, the discord things and/or just for fun of my birthday towards things. rn id accept cashapp or! united miles. cause have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milage they dont use/want since i know there are business like people who have travel for the business things that their work pays for and have seen it around on imgur. if anyone wants to gift me some miles for future travel things lemme know. id take some miles. cause. miles. united just changed their earn rates so just when im starting to travel they have made it more painful for those of us that cant qualify for their cards to earn and do like. award flights or upgrades on 15 hour flights with miles things. Mind you I am in no way begging or expecting things. and also know people have gifted me things in the past so if you want to please poke me via dm here since I would like to direct that occasional generosity I have received from people towards things I could use since I dont game much anymore and not doing throne again since planning on moving at some point so trying to limit my physical stuff until that happens in the next few years. thanks! I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #deviousness #makinmywaydowntown
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

1

23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Alonsee made this long cardigan as a gift for someone! (They're going to weave in the ends). This is a lot of work!
27 Man Tax: Marcus Faligno
“As long as people will accept crap, it will be financially profitable to dispense it. It becomes an ever-descending spiral.” - Dick Cavett So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: The Pentagon's Official Casualty Count for ~750 Troops Killed or Wounded: 'We Have Nothing For You' — An Adequate Fucking Summary of This Entire War
item.description: Nearly 750 American troops killed or wounded and the Pentagon's official response to journalists asking for the numbers is — I shit you not — "We have nothing for you." NOTHING. FOR YOU. These are HUMAN BEINGS not a fucking Comcast customer service ticket ??? Hegseth prayed at a press conference — PRAYED — asking God to protect the troops with his "almighty arms of providence." A defense official's response? "WHY DIDN'T HEGSETH PROTECT THEM?" Fuckhead you traded body armour for BIBLE VERSES ??? WHAT IS HAPPENING Trump said Iran has "no anti-aircraft equipment" and their radar is "100% annihilated." Iran then IMMEDIATELY shot down an F-15 and crashed an A-10. The universe fact-checked him in REAL TIME and the receipts have two missing crew members ?️??? 200 sailors burned on the USS Gerald Ford. Not in the casualty count. Troops hiding in HOTELS. Not in the casualty count. An F-15 downed. Barely acknowledged. This isn't a war, it's a fucking cover-up with bombs ??? #CasualtyGate #IranWar #HegsethLied #TrumpWar #OperationEpicFury #BringThemHome https://theintercept.com/2026/04/01/iran-war-us-casualty-numbers-trump-hegseth/
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: GOP governor candidate says the quiet part out loud
item.description: Florida Republican gubernatorial candidate James Fishback blew up at a Black voter and told him he should be "lynched" for asking about the allegations of Fishback's inappropriate behavior with teenagers. "I mean, I don't want you ever smashing girls, teenage girls, in our state ever again," the voter shot back. "So promise me, never smash a minor again?" "Why haven't I been arrested?" said Fishback. "Why haven't I been arrested? You should be lynched!" https://www.rawstory.com/james-fishback-2676657612/
item.dc:creator: ChromePlatedEquator

item.title: Here's some bottom shelf memes I found shoved behind my kitchen drawer
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Come watch paint dry with me on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka NOW IN 4K!
This dump was brought to you by the meme addicted insomniacs from the Bottom Shelf Community where we shitpost 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. We stream games on twitch.tv/ bottomshelfvodka Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. Deal memes. Steal memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka

item.title: "Father. Please ham?" - Frank, probably
item.description: Did Easter dinner with the tiniers tonight because they're going to their mom's tomorrow at noon. Started cooking at 2. Done by 5. Now going to take a shower. Pooders and Frank really wanted ham. Chessie just wanted to smell it. They all got ham.

item.title: Sweet play..
item.description: Banana Ball is a fast-paced, entertainment-focused baseball exhibition league created by the Savannah Bananas, often described as the "Harlem Globetrotters of Baseball". It features choreographed dances, fan interaction, and unique, quick-rules, such as a two-hour time limit, no walks, and fouls caught by fans being outs.
item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: Meanwhile, back in ye olde Jesus-timey days...
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: Ousted Army Chief of Staff Gen. Randy George quietly obliterates TV warrior Pete Hegseth in his exit email...
item.description: Ousted Army Chief of Staff Gen. Randy George quietly obliterates TV warrior Pete Hegseth in his exit email by insisting that our troops “deserve courageous leaders of character” who don’t root for war crimes! In his final email to Pentagon brass after Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth demanded his immediate retirement, Gen. Randy George wrote: “Our soldiers are truly the best in the world – they deserve tough training and courageous leaders of character. I have no doubt you will all continue to lead with courage, character, and grit.” The message was sent to Hegseth, top Army officials, and three- and four-star generals just after Gen. George was pushed out for opposing a ground invasion into Iran. CBS News confirmed the email is authentic. This comes as Hegseth continues his aggressive purge of senior military leadership in the middle of a war going badly, firing more than a dozen top-ranking officers who don’t fully align with Trump and Hegseth’s “vision,” or in other words, think that a ground incursion into Iran would be a huge mistake with that would invariably end in a huge loss of American lives, treasure, and global prestige. The message was a clarion call to his fellow senior officers still on the job to hold the line on the way they were all taught to serve, within the boundaries of international standards of military conduct and resist Hegseth's excesses. George, who served as Army chief of staff since 2023, was replaced on an acting basis by Gen. Christopher LaNeve, who previously served as Hegseth’s personal military aide. What was all that noise about merit, bro? The contrast between the two military men at this point in time is simply shocking. In times of war, however they may start, experience and common sense and a sense of mission should guide operations. Hegseth flails about and fires anyone who does this rather than cheerlead for his criminal, reckless approach. If you think the United States needs more, rather than fewer, General George’s right about now, please share your opinions.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: GovBrief Today #429
item.description: The Trump administration filed an emergency motion Friday night to save its $400 million ballroom. The administration's lawyers told a federal appeals court that halting construction was "shocking" and warned that canvas tents on the grounds are vulnerable to missiles and drones. "Time is of the essence!" they wrote, with the exclamation point, in a brief about a ballroom. The canvas tents are there because the administration tore down the historic East Wing and turned the White House grounds into a construction site. The security risk they cited is one they built with their own bulldozers, and the last time a foreign enemy struck the White House was 1814. The Bush-appointed judge who stopped the project had already reviewed the classified security evidence and found no such risk. He reminded the president that he is the steward of the White House, not its owner. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and tell them the government just defined what it considers an emergency, and it's a ballroom. We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 429 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260404-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr04 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/calif-ballots [3] https://go.govbrief.today/admission-race [4] https://go.govbrief.today/ballroom-emergency [5] https://go.govbrief.today/abused-toddler [6] https://go.govbrief.today/soleimani-relatives Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
